tables.name: commissions
columns: id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4()
skill_level VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL CHECK (skill_level IN ('Average', 'Advanced'))
status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'Requested' CHECK (status IN ('Requested', 'Accepted', 'In Progress', 'WIP Shared', 'Completed', 'Delivered'))
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()

tables.name: commission_updates
columns: id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4()
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()

storage_buckets.name: commission-refs
storage_buckets.description: Stores user uploaded reference images for commissions

storage_buckets.name: commission-wips
storage_buckets.description: Stores artist WIP (Work In Progress) images

PriceCalculator.description: Interactive split-screen calculator. Left: Inputs (Sliders/Selects). Right: 'The Receipt' (Live visual estimate).

inputs: Medium - Card Selection (Pencil, Watercolor, Acrylic, Oil, Hyper-Realism)
Skill Level - Radio Toggle (Average vs Advanced)
Detail Level - Segmented Control (Basic, Detailed, Hyper-Realistic)
specs.visuals: Show a dynamic price range bar. Highlight the selected medium with an icon or texture.

CommissionStatusTimeline.description: Vertical timeline showing the journey of the art piece.

specs.features: Show timestamps. For 'WIP Shared', display a thumbnail of the uploaded image that opens in a lightbox.

WIPUploader.description: Drag and drop zone for artists to upload progress shots.

fields: Update Status Toggle (e.g., mark as 'WIP Shared')

pages.description: Full page wrapper for the PriceCalculator + Request Form. Clean, distraction-free.
pages.layout: Two-column layout on desktop. Calculator sticky on right, Form flows on left.

pages.description: List of active/past commissions for the user.
pages.layout: Grid of 'Commission Cards'. Each card shows status, latest WIP thumb, and 'Track' button.

pages.description: Kanban or List view for artists to manage their queue.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Ensure 'recharts' is available for any price visualization if needed.
- Subject Multiplier: For subjects > 1, add 15% of base price per extra subject. Formula: `total = base + (base * (subjects-1) * 0.15)`
- Display: Show Min, Max, and Average prices.
- Create the 'commissions' and 'commission_updates' tables in Supabase/Postgres.
- Use 'Playfair Display' for the 'Estimated Price' big number to make it feel valuable.
- Use skeleton loaders when fetching commission status.
- Ensure mobile responsiveness for the calculator (stack columns).
universal_guidelines: Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover lift, scale).
